headline: Raymond James Starts Insmed (INSM) at Outperform, Citing Limited Competition
summary: Insmed Incorporated (NASDAQ:INSM) is one of the Stocks that Billionaire Druckenmiller and Jim Cramer like. On April 9, 2026, Raymond James initiated coverage of Insmed Incorporated (NASDAQ:INSM) with an Outperform rating. The firm’s analyst set a price target of $200 on the stock. According to the analyst’s research note, the early launch of Brinsupri has […]

headline: Raymond James Continues To Be An Investment-Grade Buying Opportunity
summary: Raymond James's growth is fueled by advisor network expansion, strong net inflows, and the Clark Capital acquisition. See why RJF stock is upgraded to strong buy.
